name: Stuffless Rope Animals (Pa3354)
description: For small breed dogs who love to chew, these cute & unique animal-shaped toys have a squeaker in the head that makes a squeeky sound to grab dogs' attention in making a fun toy for them. STUFFLESS DOG TOY FOR PUPPY - No stuffing dog toy for small dogs & little puppies. This is much safer for your pet than your normal stuffed toy. It also saves you the hassle of cleaning up stuffing everywhere! CRINKLE SOUND - Dog toys can tug, crinkle, & squeak. Moreover, if tossed this toy will float effortlessly. When a dog chews the interior, the crinkly paper makes a strange noise for entertainment. ROPE DOG TOY - Cotton rope arms & rope legs ideal for tiny dog teething toys & puppy chew toys. Each toy comes with 4 knots for dogs to tug, chew, brush teeth, & massage gums. SAFE MATERIAL - These are tough chew toys for dogs, made of natural cotton, non-toxic. Both hand wash & machine wash are OK. No more heavy duty cleans up from regular stuffed toys.
